prompt: Photograph of a finished exterior-trim touch-up on a Lawrence MA two-family — a section of the front entry showing freshly repainted white window casings, freeze-board, and porch-column trim against the existing tan clapboard siding. Painters tape lines crisp where trim meets siding. A single black porch light visible at the edge. Soft side light from late-morning sun. High-contrast, slightly desaturated photography, working-contractor documentary catalog feel — NOT HGTV bright, NOT luxury hotel-staged, NOT real-estate photographer brightness. The lighting in a Snap-On distributor's tool room. No people in frame, no readable text anywhere, no logos, no brand names visible.
